name: preuser-plugins
description: preuser's Claude Code plugins — set up preuser on your repo, author journeys, and seal credentials for the AI user.

plugins.name: preuser
plugins.description: Set up preuser on a repo: /preuser:setup drafts .preuser/config.yml targets (sandbox, static URL, or GitHub Deployment URL) plus journeys; /preuser:seal encrypts a login credential to commit as ciphertext.
